description_long: This is a high-top sneaker in a soft pastel pink color, featuring a suede-like upper material and a white rubber sole. The shoe has white laces arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the sides are adorned with decorative fringe detailing that extends to the back, where a knotted tassel is visible. The toe cap is rounded and reinforced, while the midsole is thick and flat, providing a sturdy base. The overall design is casual yet stylish, suitable for urban environments and streetwear fashion. The shoe appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pastel pink high-top sneaker with white laces, decorative fringe, and a thick white sole, in clean and new condition.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, white laces, and the symmetrical shape of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the fringe detail along the ankle and the flat white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the knotted tassel and the full extent of the fringe at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the fringe and the clean, unmarked sole.
